sources.name: Ville de Lausanne — Portrait statistique 2024/2025
sources.note: PDF not downloadable via automated fetch — richest commune-level source

sources.name: Ville de Lausanne — Population theme page

population.source: Ville de Lausanne municipal register / BFS STATPOP
population.note: Jump from ~142k (2021) to ~149k (2022) may reflect switch from BFS permanent-resident to municipal register count. Verify with BFS STATPOP PX-Web.

age_pyramid.source: Wikipedia / BFS STATPOP aggregates. Full 5-year brackets by gender in Lausanne Portrait statistique PDF (not accessible).
age_pyramid.data_quality: PARTIAL — aggregate brackets only, male/female split estimated from national ratios
age_pyramid.sum_check: M+F = 148,300. Based on ~2024 pop (~148,810), within 0.3%. Note: aggregates are labelled 2020 but bracket distribution applied to recent population total.
age_pyramid.note: 5-year bracket counts are ESTIMATES derived from aggregate percentages (4 brackets from 2020) applied to ~2024 population total, distributed using national age patterns. University city effect: age 20-29 disproportionately large. Must verify against Portrait statistique PDF.

nationality.source: Ville de Lausanne population page / 24heures reporting
nationality.note: Top 4 ranking confirmed across sources. Exact counts NOT found — these are estimates based on cantonal proportions. Full data in Portrait statistique PDF.

languages.source: StatVD — cantonal (Vaud) level figures used as proxy. Lausanne-specific data in Portrait statistique PDF.
languages.data_quality: CANTONAL PROXY — Lausanne likely more diverse than Vaud average due to university/international presence

employment.total_jobs_note: Total job count for Lausanne commune not found. Canton Vaud has ~440k jobs.
employment.unemployment_source: Ville de Lausanne — Dec 2024 figures (4,842 avg unemployed)
employment.note: 94.2% tertiary confirmed — comparable to Geneva. Lausanne is a major services/admin/education hub.

income.note: SIGNIFICANT GAP — Income data behind interactive interfaces (Raiffeisen commune profile, AFC). Available in Lausanne Portrait statistique PDF. Canton Vaud median is lower than Geneva (~CHF 6,200 vs 6,788 gross monthly).

education.note: 51% tertiary attainment — highest on the corridor. Reflects university city character (UNIL, EPFL, ECAL, etc.).

housing.source: BFS housing census (ownership), Ville de Lausanne / media (vacancy), estimates (rent)
housing.avg_rent_source: Estimated from media reports — approximate. Below Geneva but high by Swiss standards.
housing.note: Very low ownership (12.8%) even by Swiss standards. Vacancy higher than Geneva (0.82% vs 0.34%) but still tight.

commuters.source: BFS Pendulaire survey (cited in geneve.ch Interroge), SEM STAF for frontaliers
commuters.frontaliers_lausanne_note: Rough estimate — Lausanne represents ~19% of Vaud jobs, applied to cantonal frontalier total
commuters.note: Domestic commuter data is from 2012-2016. Frontaliers much smaller than Geneva (~8.5k vs 112k). Most Vaud frontaliers work in Nyon/Morges area closer to border.

universities.source: Institutional websites, Wikipedia, edurank.org, IMD Annual Report 2024

institutions.name: Université de Lausanne (UNIL)
institutions.note: Research university, Dorigny campus. Strong in social sciences, law, geosciences

institutions.name: EPFL (École Polytechnique Fédérale de Lausanne)
institutions.note: Federal institute of technology. 60% international — one of Europe's top tech universities

institutions.name: EHL Group (École hôtelière de Lausanne)
institutions.note: World's first hotel school (1893). 127 nationalities. 90% international.

institutions.name: ECAL (École cantonale d'art de Lausanne)
institutions.note: Ranked among world's best design schools

institutions.name: IMD (International Institute for Management Development)
institutions.note: MBA/EMBA + 21,000 exec ed participants. 95% international. Elite business school.

institutions.name: Other (Haute école de musique, smaller institutions)

universities.note: Nearly 1 in 4 Lausanne residents is a student. The university ecosystem defines the city's character — younger demographics, higher international mix, innovation/tech culture. EPFL+UNIL Dorigny campus alone has ~31k students.

data_quality_flags: Age pyramid 5-year brackets: ESTIMATED from 4 aggregate brackets — verify with Portrait statistique PDF
Population 2015-2019: interpolated. Jump at 2022 may be definitional change.
Nationality counts: ranks confirmed, exact figures estimated from cantonal proportions
Language data: cantonal (Vaud) proxy — Lausanne likely more diverse
Income data: COMPLETE GAP — need Portrait statistique PDF or Raiffeisen/AFC data
Total jobs in commune: NOT FOUND
Frontalier commune estimate: rough calculation from cantonal total
